title: Piperia michaelii
taxonomy: Piperia michaelii is classified as a species of orchid, specifically within the genus Piperia. It is a type of terrestrial orchid native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. Within the plant kingdom, Piperia michaelii is classified as a flowering plant, belonging to the division Magnoliophyta. The plant's classification is further detailed as a member of the family Orchidaceae and the order Asparagales. At the most basic level, Piperia michaelii is classified as a kingdom Plantae.
